tasks.subject: Task 0: R8 브랜치 + spec §10 R8 체크리스트 확장 + plan + tasks.json + Decision Log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r8` 브랜치 main tip(`114576d`)에서 분기. spec §10 Phase R8 블록을 R3/R4/R5/R6/R7 와 동일한 체크박스+산출물 링크 템플릿으로 확장. Decision Log 8건(D1~D8) 기록. tasks.json 14-slot skeleton.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r8.md, docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r8.md.tasks.json, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R8만)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r8

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r8.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r8.md.tasks.json","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD","acceptanceCriteria":["rolestra-phase-r8 브랜치 생성","Decision Log에 D1~D8 8건 기록","§10 Phase R8 체크박스+산출물 템플릿 확장","tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 존재"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared AvatarUploadRequest/Response + member:upload-avatar IPC 채널 + zod
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/shared/member-profile-types.ts` 에 AvatarUploadRequest/Response 타입 추가. `src/shared/ipc-types.ts` 에 `member:upload-avatar` 채널. `src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts` 에 zod. preload 화이트리스트.

**Files:** src/shared/member-profile-types.ts, src/shared/ipc-types.ts, src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/shared/__tests__/ipc-schemas.test.ts (또는 member-profile-types.test.ts)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ipc-schemas member-profile-types`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/member-profile-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ipc-schemas","acceptanceCriteria":["member:upload-avatar 채널 일관 선언","zod round-trip 4 케이스 green","기존 6 채널 회귀 0","typecheck exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Avatar 컴포넌트 + WorkStatusDot 4-state + ProfileAvatar 위임
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/components/members/Avatar.tsx` 신규 (DEFAULT_AVATARS 8 emoji+color 렌더 + custom 분기 + initials fallback). `src/renderer/components/members/WorkStatusDot.tsx` 신규 (4 상태 + i18n 라벨 + connecting pulse). `ProfileAvatar` 가 MemberView prop 받으면 Avatar 위임.

**Files:** src/renderer/components/members/{Avatar,WorkStatusDot}.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/components/shell/ProfileAvatar.tsx + __tests__/ProfileAvatar.test.tsx (확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- Avatar WorkStatusDot ProfileAvatar`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/components/members/Avatar.tsx","src/renderer/components/members/WorkStatusDot.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/ProfileAvatar.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- Avatar WorkStatusDot ProfileAvatar","acceptanceCriteria":["DEFAULT_AVATARS 8 key 모두 렌더 케이스 green","4 work-status 도트 + i18n 라벨 정확","ProfileAvatar R5 회귀 0","a11y aria-label"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AvatarPicker 컴포넌트 (8 default 갤러리 + custom upload 트리거)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/components/members/AvatarPicker.tsx` 신규 — 8 default 그리드 + 사진 업로드 + 되돌리기. `src/renderer/hooks/use-avatar-picker.ts` 신규 — `member:list-avatars` 캐시 + uploadCustom mutation.

**Files:** src/renderer/components/members/AvatarPicker.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-avatar-picker.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- AvatarPicker use-avatar-picker`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/components/members/AvatarPicker.tsx","src/renderer/hooks/use-avatar-picker.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- AvatarPicker","acceptanceCriteria":["8 default 클릭 → onChange 정확","upload mock → custom kind onChange","되돌리기 → default 첫 항목","avatars fetch 실패 fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: MemberProfileEditModal (Radix Dialog: 4 필드 + AvatarPicker)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileEditModal.tsx` 신규 — Radix Dialog, role/personality/expertise/avatar 4 필드, save → `member:update-profile` invoke. `use-member-profile.ts` hook (mount-fetch + mutation).

**Files:** src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileEditModal.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-member-profile.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- MemberProfileEditModal use-member-profile`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileEditModal.tsx","src/renderer/hooks/use-member-profile.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- MemberProfileEditModal","acceptanceCriteria":["4 필드 → save → invoke 인자 정확","AvatarPicker onChange 반영","취소 시 invoke 0","에러 시 모달 유지 + 메시지"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AvatarStore + member:upload-avatar handler + ArenaRoot getAvatarsDir
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/members/avatar-store.ts` 신규 — copy/remove + ext 화이트리스트(png/jpg/jpeg/webp/gif) + 5MB 제한. `arena-root-service.getAvatarsDir()`. `handleMemberUploadAvatar` IPC handler. router 등록.

**Files:** src/main/members/avatar-store.ts + __tests__, src/main/arena/arena-root-service.ts (확장), src/main/ipc/handlers/member-handler.ts, src/main/ipc/router.ts, src/main/ipc/__tests__/handlers-v3.test.ts (확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- avatar-store member-handler`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/members/avatar-store.ts","src/main/arena/arena-root-service.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/member-handler.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- avatar-store member-handler","acceptanceCriteria":["ext 화이트리스트만 허용","5MB 초과 거절","덮어쓰기 + ext 변경 정리","응답에 상대+절대 경로"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: MemberProfilePopover (4 액션: 편집 / 외근↔출근 / 연락해보기 / DM)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfilePopover.tsx` 신규 — Radix Popover, 헤더(Avatar+이름+role) + 본문(personality/expertise/WorkStatusDot+라벨) + 푸터 4 버튼. 외근 토글은 set-status, 연락해보기는 reconnect, DM 시작은 StartDmButton 위임.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfilePopover.tsx + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- MemberProfilePopover`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfilePopover.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- MemberProfilePopover","acceptanceCriteria":["편집 → onEdit 호출","외근↔출근 토글 invoke 분기 정확","연락해보기 → reconnect + indicator 갱신","DM 시작 → 적절한 IPC","a11y aria-pressed/aria-label"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 아바타 클릭 wire (Message / MemberRow / PeopleWidget) + Edit 진입
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Message/MemberRow/PeopleWidget 각각 아바타 onClick → Popover open → 'Popover 편집' → EditModal open.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/{Message,MemberRow}.tsx, src/renderer/features/dashboard/widgets/PeopleWidget.tsx, (선택) src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileTrigger.tsx, __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- Message MemberRow PeopleWidget MemberProfileTrigger`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/Message.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/MemberRow.tsx","src/renderer/features/dashboard/widgets/PeopleWidget.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- Message MemberRow PeopleWidget","acceptanceCriteria":["3 surface 클릭 → Popover open","Popover 편집 → EditModal open","ESC/외부 클릭 close"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Production main/index.ts MemberProfileService boot + MemberWarmupService.warmAll
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/members/member-warmup-service.ts` 신규 — Promise.allSettled + per-provider 5초 timeout. main/index.ts 에서 MemberProfileRepository + MemberProfileService boot + setMemberProfileServiceAccessor + setAvatarStoreAccessor + warmAll fire-and-forget.

**Files:** src/main/members/member-warmup-service.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts, src/main/providers/registry.ts (어댑터 검토), src/main/__tests__/member-boot.test.ts (또는 r2 smoke 확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- member-warmup-service member-boot`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/members/member-warmup-service.ts","src/main/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- member-warmup-service","acceptanceCriteria":["member:list production 에서 throw 0","member:list-avatars 8 default 반환","warmAll await 없음 (timing 검증)","5초 timeout 동작"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: MeetingTurnExecutor work-status 게이트 + meeting:turn-skipped 이벤트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `meeting-turn-executor.executeTurn` 시작점에 `getWorkStatus(participantId) !== 'online'` 게이트 — skip + emitMeetingTurnSkipped + system message append. shared meeting-stream-types 에 이벤트 타입 추가. preload + use-meeting-stream reducer + Thread 시스템 메시지 분기.

**Files:** src/shared/meeting-stream-types.ts, src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/renderer/hooks/use-meeting-stream.ts, src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor.work-status-gate use-meeting-stream`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts","src/shared/meeting-stream-types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor","acceptanceCriteria":["online → 정상 turn (회귀 0)","비-online → skip + 이벤트 + system message","SSM TURN_DONE/FAIL 발사 0","4 케이스 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: MeetingTurnExecutor v2→v3 PersonaBuilder swap (즉시 반영)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** meeting-turn-executor 의 v2 `buildEffectivePersona(provider, opts)` 호출을 v3 `memberProfileService.buildPersona(participantId)` + `buildPermissionRules` shim 으로 교체. v2 builder 의 named export 승격. v2 engine 호출자 0 (R11 삭제 후보).

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts + __tests__, src/main/engine/persona-builder.ts (export 승격), src/main/__tests__/r2-integration-smoke.test.ts (regression)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor && grep -r buildEffectivePersona src/main/meetings`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts","src/main/engine/persona-builder.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor","acceptanceCriteria":["meeting-turn-executor v2 buildEffectivePersona import 0","v3 buildPersona system prompt Identity 섹션 포함","사용자 편집 → 다음 턴 즉시 반영","v2 builder 호출자 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Playwright E2E member-profile-flow.spec.ts (수동 퇴근 → 턴 스킵 → 출근 복귀)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §11 시나리오 — 메시지 버블 아바타 → popover → edit modal 저장 → 외근 토글 → 회의 턴 skip → 연락해보기 → 출근 복귀. WSL 제약 시 R4~R7 와 동일 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS.

**Files:** e2e/member-profile-flow.spec.ts, e2e/helpers/mock-provider.ts (재사용)

**Verify:** `npx playwright test member-profile-flow` 또는 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS
